Compliance.description: No SA regulatory issues found; GDPR compliant with Ireland hosting option suitable for POPIA similarity, but lacks native SA labor law/payroll compliance (BCEA/UIF). Global, requires integrations for full SA setup.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Global reviews strong (4.5+ on Capterra/GetApp/G2); no SA-specific HelloPeter/Google reviews found. Positive on ease/UI, mixed on advanced needs.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive core HR for SMBs; good value globally but lacks SA payroll/transparency, requires add-ons for local needs.

Innovation.description: Modern UI, AI assistant, mobile apps (4.2-4.7 ratings), 150+ integrations, custom dashboards/benchmarks.

Customer Support.description: In-house support praised but mixed reports of delays, chargeable premium; no 24/7, self-serve focus.

Accessibility & Security.description: Strong global security (encryption, SOC2, Zero Trust); GDPR/DPF compliant, data hosted in Ireland option for EU-like regions. No explicit POPIA mention but GDPR adequacy likely transfers; good accessibility via web/mobile.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Quote-based ~$10-20/emp/mo USD; no public SA ZAR pricing

socialSentiment.summary: No SA-specific sentiment on HelloPeter/Google/X; global positive on usability, concerns on support/pricing
